revision.text:
[[ja:蛭子神社 (那賀町)]] {{Expand Japanese|蛭子神社 (那賀町)}} {{Infobox religious building | name = Hiruko Shrine (Q106852693) | native_name = 蛭子神社 | image = Hiruko-jinja.jpeg | mapframe = yes | mapframe-zoom = 15 | mapframe-wikidata = yes | mapframe-point = none | map_type = Japan | map_caption = Hiruko Shrine (Q106852693) | coordinates = {{coord|33.86002777777778|134.5021111111111}} | map_relief = 1 | religious_affiliation = [[Shinto]] }} {{nihongo|'''Hiruko Shrine'''|蛭子神社}} is a [[shinto shrine]] in the [[Engishiki Jinmyōchō]]. It is located in [[Awa Province (Tokushima)]]. == instance of (P31) == * {{ill|Shinto shrine|lt=Shinto shrine|ar|جينجا|arz|ضريح شنتو|bcl|Shinto shrine|ca|Jinja|cs|Šintoistická svatyně|da|Shinto-tempel|de|Shintō-Schrein|el|Σιντοϊστικό Ιερό|en|Shinto shrine|eo|Ŝintoa sanktejo|es|Jinja|eu|Jinja|fa|معبد شینتویی|fi|Šintolainen pyhäkkö|fr|Sanctuaire shinto|hi|शिंतो मंदिर|hr|Šintoistički hram|hu|Sintó szentély|id|Jinja|it|Jinja|ja|神社|ka|ძინძია|ko|신사 (신토)|lb|Shintō-Schräin|mr|शिंतो मंदिर|nl|Jinja (heiligdom)|no|Jinja|or|ଜିଞ୍ଜା|pl|Jinja|pt|Templo xintoísta|ru|Дзиндзя|sc|Jinja|simple|Shinto shrine|sl|Šintoistično svetišče|sr|Шинтоистички храм|sv|Jinja|th|ศาลเจ้าชินโต|tr|Şinto tapınağı|uk|Святилище (синто)|vi|Thần xã|wuu|神社|zh_yue|神社|zh|神社|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} * {{ill|Shikinaisha|lt=Shikinaisha|en|Shikinaisha|zh|式內社|qid=Q134917286|1=Shikinaisha}} * {{ill|Shikinai Shosha|lt=Shikinai Shōsha|en|Shikinai Shosha|ja|式内小社|simple|Shikinai Shosha|qid=Q134917287|1=Shikinai Shosha}} * {{ill|Q135022904|ltq=Q135022904|qid=Q135022904|1=Shikinai Ronsha}} * {{ill|Q135160342|ltq=Q135160342|qid=Q135160342|1=Kokuhei-sha}}Kokugakuin University Shrine database == part of (P361) == * {{ill|Q11657514|ltq=Q11657514|qid=Q11657514|1=List of Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)}} ** Series ordinal: 42 ** P155: {{ill|Unawino Shrine|lt=Unawino Shrine|qid=Q135041372|1=Unawino Shrine}} ** P156: {{ill|Q135041374|ltq=Q135041374|qid=Q135041374|1=Murohimeno Shrine}} == located in the administrative territorial entity (P131) == * {{ill|Q1205685|ltq=Q1205685|qid=Q1205685|1=Naka, Tokushima}} * {{ill|Awa Province (Tokushima)|lt=Awa Province|be|Ава (правінцыя, Сікоку)|cs|Provincie Awa (Tokušima)|de|Provinz Awa (Tokushima)|en|Awa Province (Tokushima)|es|Provincia de Awa (Tokushima)|fa|ولایت آوا|fr|Province d'Awa (Tokushima)|gl|Provincia de Awa, Tokushima|id|Provinsi Awa (Tokushima)|it|Awa (provincia, Tokushima)|ja|阿波国|ko|아와국 (난카이도)|lt|Avos žemė (Tokušima)|nl|Awa (Tokushima)|pt|Província de Awa (Tokushima)|ru|Ава (Сикоку)|simple|Awa Province (Tokushima)|sk|Awa (provincia, Tokušima)|sr|Провинција Ава (Шикоку)|tr|Awa (vilayet, Tokushima)|uk|Провінція Ава (Шікоку)|zh_min_nan|Awa-kok (Nankaidô)|zh|阿波國|qid=Q907457|1=Awa Province (Tokushima)}} * {{ill|Q1156492|ltq=Q1156492|qid=Q1156492|1=Naka District, Tokushima}} == coordinate location (P625) == * {{coord|33.86002777777778|134.5021111111111}} == image (P18) == * Hiruko-jinja.jpeg == Shrine database|qid=Q135159299|1=Kokugakuin University Shrine database}} == modern shrine ranking (P13723) == * {{ill|Q134917316|ltq=Q134917316|qid=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} ** End time: {'time': '+1946-02-02T00:00:00Z', 'timezone': 0, 'before': 0, 'after': 0, 'precision': 11, 'calendarmodel': 'http://www.wikidata.org/entity/Q1985727'} ** P1534: ᥓᥣᥱ ᥙᥣᥢᥱ|tet|Japaun|te|జపాన్|tg|Ҷопон|th|ประเทศญี่ปุ่น|thnews|หมวดหมู่:ประเทศญี่ปุ่น|tig|ጃፓን|ti|ጃፓን|tk|Ýaponiýa|tl|Hapon|tly|Japonijə|tn|Japan|tok|ma Nijon|to|Siapani|tpi|Siapan|trv|Tanah Tunux|tr|Japonya|trnews|Kategori:Japonya|trquote|Japonya|trvoyage|Japonya|ts|Japani|tt|Япония|tum|Japan|tw|Japan|tyv|Япония|ty|Tāpōnē|udm|Япония|ug|ياپونىيە|uk|Японія|uknews|Категорія:Японія|ukquote|Японія|ukvoyage|Японія|ur|جاپان|uz|Yaponiya|vec|Japon|vep|Japonii|ve|Japan|vi|Nhật Bản|vibooks|Các quốc gia/Nhật Bản|vivoyage|Nhật Bản|vls|Japan|vo|Yapän|war|Hapon|wa|Djapon|wo|Sapoŋ|wuu|日本|xal|Ниxуудин Нутг|xh|IJapani|xmf|იაპონია|yi|יאפאן|yo|Japan|za|Nyiedbonj|zea|Japan|zgh|ⵏⵉⴱⵓⵏ|zh_classical|日本|zh_min_nan|Ji̍t-pún|zh_yue|日本|zh|日本|zhnews|Category:日本|zhquote|日本|zhvoyage|日本|zu|IJaphani|qid=Q17|1=Japan}} == name in kana (P1814) == * ひるこじんじゃ == Corporate Number (Japan) (P3225) == * 4480005004531 == said to be the same as (P460) == * {{ill|Wanasaifusono Shrine|lt=Wanasaifusono Shrine|qid=Q135041373|1=Wanasaifusono Shrine}} == street address (P6375) == * {'text': '徳島県那賀郡那賀町和食字町154', 'language': 'ja'} * {'text': '徳島県海部郡海陽町大里', 'language': 'ja'} [[JA:蛭子神社 (那賀町)]] {{wikidata link|Q106852693}} == Japanese content == {{神社 |名称= Hiruko Shrine |画像= [[ファイル:Hiruko-jinja.jpeg|250px]] |所在地= {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|qid=Q160734|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}{{ill|lt=Naka District|Q1156492|qid=Q1156492|1=Naka District, Tokushima}}{{ill|lt=Naka, Tokushima|Q1205685|qid=Q1205685|1=Naka, Tokushima}} Wajiki Aza Machi 154 |位置 = {{WikidataCoord|display=inline,title}} |祭神= {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Hiruko Ōkami|1=UNKNOWN}}
{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Amaterasu Ōmikami|1=Amaterasu|qid=Q455602}}
{{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Susanoo-no-Kami|1=UNKNOWN}} |社格= {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Shikinaisha|1=Shikinaisha|qid=Q134917286}}, former {{ill|lt=Gōsha|Q134917316|qid=Q134917316|1=Gō-sha}} |創建= unknown |本殿= |別名= |例祭= {{ill|lt=October 9|Q2923|qid=Q2923|1=October 9}} and {{ill|lt=October 10|Q2921|qid=Q2921|1=October 10}} |神事= |地図= {{Location map|Japan Tokushima|label=Hiruko Shrine|position=bottom|width=200|mark=Shinto torii icon vermillion.svg|marksize=15|float=center|caption=}} {{maplink2|frame=yes|plain=yes|type=point|zoom=9|marker=religious-shinto|frame-align=center|frame-width=200|frame-height=200}} }} [[ファイル:Fufusugi.jpeg|thumb|Paired cedars]] [[File:Hiruko shrine 20231031 1.jpg|thumb|Main sanctuary and worship hall]] '''Hiruko Shrine''' (ひるこじんじゃ) is a {{ill|lt=Shinto shrine|Q845945|qid=Q845945|1=Shinto shrine}} in {{ill|lt=Naka, Tokushima|Q1205685|qid=Q1205685|1=Naka, Tokushima}}, {{ill|lt=Tokushima Prefecture|Q160734|qid=Q160734|1=Tokushima Prefecture}}. It is one of the {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Washiki Seven Lucky Gods|1=UNKNOWN}} ({{ill|lt=Ebisu|Q1129330|qid=Q1129330|lt=Ebisu Ōkami|1=Ebisu (mythology)}}). === History === Founding is unknown. In {{ill|lt=823|Q29944|qid=Q29944|1=823}} (Tenchō 2), {{ill|lt=Kūkai|Q222227|qid=Q222227|1=Kūkai}} performed a transfer-enshrinement. In {{ill|lt=1505|Q6153|qid=Q6153|1=1505}} (Eishō 2), {{ill|lt=Hosokawa Sumimoto|Q4390574|qid=Q4390574|1=Hosokawa Sumimoto}}, who served as kanrei, dedicated yabusame. Later it was rebuilt in {{ill|lt=1601|Q6725|qid=Q6725|1=1601}} (Keichō 6){{Cite web|和書|url=http://engishiki.org/awa2/bun/awh560703-04.html|title=蛭子神社旧地|publisher=延喜式神社の調査|accessdate=2021-05-11}}. In the precincts stand two giant {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=cedar|1=UNKNOWN}} trees about 1,000 years old, affectionately called the "Meoto Sugi," along with old trees such as a large {{ill|lt=camphor tree|Q158722|qid=Q158722|lt=ōkusu|1=Camphora officinarum}} and {{ill|lt=Inumaki|Q165063|qid=Q165063|1=Podocarpus macrophyllus}}. Also within the shrine grounds, {{ill|lt=Boran|Q10911571|qid=Q10911571|1=Luisia teres}}, designated a Tokushima Prefectural Natural Monument, grows naturally and is best viewed in May{{Cite web|和書|url=https://www.jalan.net/kankou/spt_36368ag2132025517/|title=蛭子神社|publisher=じゃらん|accessdate=2021-05-11}}. === Enshrined deities === * {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Hiruko Ōkami|1=UNKNOWN}} * {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Amaterasu Ōmikami|1=Amaterasu|qid=Q455602}} * {{ill|UNKNOWN|lt=Susanoo-no-Kami|1=UNKNOWN}} === Access === * About 80 minutes by car from {{ill|lt=Tokushima Station|Q860775|qid=Q860775|1=Tokushima Station}} ({{ill|lt=JR Shikoku|Q496531|qid=Q496531|lt=JR|1=Shikoku Railway Company}}). === Notes === {{Reflist}} === External links === * [https://www.town.tokushima-naka.lg.jp/gyosei/docs/3615.html 蛭子神社] - Naka Town * [https://www.jalan.net/kankou/spt_36368ag2132025517/ 蛭子神社] - Jalan {{shinto-stub}} == Categories == [[Category:Wikidata generated shikinaisha pages|Hiruko Shrine (Q106852693)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Hiruko Shrine (Q106852693)]][[Category:Shikinaisha|Hiruko Shrine (Q106852693)]][[Category:Shikinai Ronsha]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]] [[Category:Shinto shrines in Tokushima Prefecture]] [[Category:Former Gō-sha in Tokushima Prefecture]] [[Category:那賀町の建築物]] [[Category:那賀町の歴史]] [[Category:Shikinaisha in Awa Province (Tokushima)]]
